SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminBrowseEventsActivity
AdminBrowseEventsActivity allows an administrator to view all events stored in Firestore and permanently delete any of them.
AdminBrowseOrganizersActivity
activity for admin to browse/remove organizers diaplays list of all organizers, allows admin to demote organizers to users and deletes all events they made Implements User story 03.05.01
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity
Activity where admins can browse and remove user profiles Implements user story 03.02.01
AdminEventAdapter
AdminEventAdapter is a RecyclerView adapter used by AdminBrowseEventsActivity.
AdminEventAdapter.EventItem
EventItem is a simple data container (a "model") for one row in the events list.
AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder
EventViewHolder holds references to the views inside one event row (item_admin_event.xml).
AdminEventAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
OnDeleteClickListener is a callback interface.
AdminHomeActivity
AdminHomeActivity is the main home page for admin to browse (and delete) events/profiles/images (and later notifications, too) User stories: 03.01.01, 03.02.01, 03.03.01
AdminOrganizerAdapter
RecyclerView Adapter for browsing organizers as an admin Takes list of OrganizerItem objects, binds them to layout for display
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OnDemoteClickListener
interface for remove organizer status button clicks (demote button)
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerItem
simple class for holding one organizer row
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerViewHolder
VieHolder class for one organizer row, chaches references for efficiency
AdminUnitTest
Unit tests for admin functionality.
AdminUserAdapter
Adapter for browsing profiles as an admin, takes a list of UserItem objects and makes them into the item_admin_user layout (so admins can browse them) using a RecyclerView
AdminUserAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
interface to handle delete button clicks
AdminUserAdapter.UserItem
simple class to hold the info for one user row, containing all of their info for ease of use
AdminUserAdapter.UserViewHolder
The ViewHolder class, holds the view for one user row, cachine the view references
CreateEvent
Organizer creates and edits events
DeviceUtils
retrieves a unique ID for an android device
Entrants
Entrants names who have joined cancelled, enrolled, or joined the waiting list of an event Organizer can view this information
Event
Event specific information - details that organizer inputs
EventData
Stores all created events data can search for an event by ID and add and edit
EventDetailsActivity
Provides details for events, such as the eventID, waitlists Allows user to join wait list and leave waitlist
EventPreview
Allows you to see the preview of an event before it is published - How it will look to users Organizer can go back to editing or upload the event back on the create/edit screen
EventTestData
 
ExampleInstrumentedTest
Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
ExampleUnitTest
Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
FirebaseManager
Class for defining firebase methods and loading in the firebase instance
GuidelinesActivity
displays guidelines for a lottery user stories implemented: - US 01.05.05: Entrant wants to know the criteria or guidelines for the lottery selection process.
InvitationAdapter
 
InvitationAdapter.InvitationListener
 
InvitationAdapter.ViewHolder
 
InvitationItem
represents an invitation to an event events are identified via ID and name/title
InvitationsActivity
provides logic for invitations to an event, including accepting/declining an invite
ListOfMyEvents
Views list of the organizers events shows event title, descrition and an edit button to edit the event - edit buttons opens CreateEvent screen
ListOfMyEvents.EventViewHolder
holds the view of each event item shows event title, description and an edit button to edit the event
MainActivity
 
OrganizerStartScreen
Home screen for organizer - create events - view entrants - view my events - edit events
OrganizerUnitTest
Unit tests for Organizer functionality.
ProfileActivity
creates a profile for a user
ProfileActivityTest
unit tests related to ProfileActivity logic tests run locally and verify user creation
SelectAnEvent
Allows organizer to select an event to view the entrant information for - organizer clicks and event - opens Entrants screen to view entrant names Organizer can go back to the organizer start screen
User
Class defining user, includes profile information and role
UserHomeActivity
 
UserSession
Class to get and set the current user.
UserTestData
fake user data for testing
UserUnitTest
unit tests related to UserHomeActivity logic tests
WaitList
Class defining a waitlist as an array of users (instead of ids) and gives the capacity and limit based on the provided event.
